title: IMMZD2DTPolioIPVOnly ValueSet for Decision Table Display Values
description: Display values for IMMZD2DTPolioIPVOnly ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions. Keys are code fragments (the part after '#' in the canonical IRI). The full IRI can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code.
